skill_availability_goal: Verify staged and committed convergence covers modes, object types, symlinks, renames, copies, deletions, path swaps and full patches, with proven transactional restoration on failure.
prompt: 执行 fixture 描述的 pre-tag candidate 收敛检查。raw metadata 显示可执行位、ordinary blob 到 symlink、rename、delete 与额外路径；逐项裁定并说明 staged gate blocked 后如何恢复和验证宿主状态。
